name: Titanium Add-on
credits: A complete Titanium progression tier for Minecraft Bedrock — mine it, smelt it, forge it, and upgrade it into endgame Titanium+ gear via the Smithing Table.

name: BladeX PvP Practice Map
credits: The map allows you to practice different PvP gamemodes against bots. You can customize kits and change different settings for both the bots and the map.

name: Ancxliy Pack V7
credits: This pack also introduces new variants for many blocks such as grass, leaves, stone, planks, flowers, and more, giving every area its own unique character. Exploring the world becomes more satisfying and visually exciting.

name: Beautifully Better Grass
credits: Beautifully Better Grass adds subtle flowers and texture variants to terrain blocks, making your Minecraft Bedrock world feel more alive and natural, without changing the vanilla feel.

name: Hotbar Slot Button
credits: This resource pack adds new buttons that act like hotbars. Each button changes the held item depending on the button,

name: Minecraft Panorama
credits: 🟩 Turned a Minecraft-inspired comic-style loading screen concept into a custom Bedrock Global Resource Pack panorama featuring Zombie, Skeleton, Creeper, Enderman, Steve, Alex, and a custom Panorama logo. 🔥👑⚡

name: Akatsuki cloud
credits: The dawn rises on a new generation of outcasts. Akatsuki Cloud brings the most iconic rogue aesthetic to your favorite archetypes, reimagining diverse characters draped in the infamous black cloak and crimson clouds.

name: Bedrock UI+
credits: A brand new ui Overhauled from hud+, this ui improves a lots of ui screens, also have so many features that Will helps you in gameplay, such as survival, PVP, etc.

name: Emeralds To Rubies
credits: Emeralds to Rubies is a vanilla-styled resource pack that replaces emerald-themed textures with beautiful ruby versions while keeping the classic Minecraft feel intact.

name: Anime Totems
credits: This pack transforms the Totem of Undying into beautifully designed anime characters, adding a fun and stylish twist to your gameplay. With 50 different characters included, you can switch between them easily using subpacks and choose the one that fits your vibe.

name: Advanta+: Advantages for Bedrock
credits:
❓Why use this pack?
Have you ever been trolled by somebody because you couldn't see the trap? Well if you were or not, no more!

name: Smooth & Colorful Fonts
credits: The classic minecraft font does fit with ui and the concept of the game. But Let's Be Honest... We wanna try new Things, new fonts, new features and stuff in anything. And That's The purpose Of addons. Similarly This Resource packs Adds Custom Smooth Font which looks clear and smooth and fits The Classic Minecraft Ui. And Not Just that It also Offers Colored Fonts, which can be switched From subpacks Setting. Currently It has 10 colored font.

name: No Particles Pack
credits: This resource pack removes most particles in Minecraft to create a cleaner and less distracting gameplay experience.
